summary: Iteration 3 testing of BlacUSA new features: image upload via Emergent object storage, public comments + moderation workflow, and bounds-based cold case map loading. All 15 new backend tests pass (real upload+public retrieval verified, full comment moderation flow verified, bounds filtering verified at multiple zoom levels). All 43 regression tests still pass. Frontend: comment submission shows pending success and hides comment, admin moderation UI with filter chips works, overview card and sidebar nav present, article/case image upload fields rendered, and Cold Cases map 'Search this area' + bounds-active + bounds-clear flow works end-to-end with zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/articles/{slug}/comments does not validate the slug exists and returns [] for unknown slugs. This is consistent with public expectation (don't leak article existence) but differs from POST which returns 404. Acceptable, not a bug.

storage.py uses requests (sync) inside async FastAPI handlers — for large/concurrent image uploads this could block the event loop. Consider httpx.AsyncClient or running put_object via asyncio.to_thread. Not blocking for V1 at low traffic.
/api/admin/upload reads entire file into memory then checks 8MB limit — a client could send arbitrary bytes before rejection. Consider streaming or pre-checking Content-Length. Minor for V1.

AdminComments UI appears to auto-switch the active filter to 'Approved' after approving a comment but the approved list briefly shows 'No comments in this view' — likely a refresh race. Functionally correct (backend approves, public sees comment), but small UX polish opportunity.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (comments submit, admin moderation queue, image upload field presence, map bounds search/clear)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed comments and image uploads in MongoDB during test run; admin moderation flow self-cleans (DELETE in test). Approved 1 pending comment via UI; main agent may wish to clean that or it remains visible on /article/the-county-with-no-pharmacy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-3 features (image upload via Emergent object storage, public comments with moderation queue, bounds-based map loading) work end-to-end. Real Emergent object storage upload+public retrieval verified (no mocks). Regression suite (43 tests) still green. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_blacusa_uploads_comments_bounds.py. JUnit XML at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_iter3_results.xml.
